title: MIN-3 Hall-A
description: A drink mixing mod based on VA-11 Hall-A.
body:
![MIN-3 Hall-A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/636716763819cceae0f994bffb06fed80c0a5b00.png)

_"Time to mix drinks and change lives."_

**MIN-3 Hall-A** is a drink mixing Mod based on _VA-11 Hall-A Cyberpunk Bartender Action_.

## Features
- A Drink Mixer Block that you can use to mix various drinks.
![Drink Mixer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3db02eddef1b8dedb011480cba53ac17158e06c.png)
- All Drinks from VA-11 Hall-A, and some original drinks!
![Mod Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d6c05f08e3de5c54c264ad890aadec01e680fd6.png)
- Recipes written in JSON, supporting custom recipes (such as using KubeJS).

## MISC
You are welcome to add this mod to any modpack.
